name: Mr. Graves

abilities.name: Bloody Brilliant
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage from an action or trigger, models within (r)2" gain a Brilliance token.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Show 'Em the Door
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly token from itself. If it does so, this action receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: And Stay Out
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of this model are dealt 1 damage and gain a Distracted token.

triggers.name: Sharpened Brilliance
triggers.text: Discard a friendly Brilliance token from either this model or the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Interrogate
triggers.text: Target may discard a card. If it does not, this model draws a card.

actions.name: Lead the Way
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models and cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: The target is moved 3", then move this model up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: No Turning Back
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Brilliance token from the target. Deal 2 damage to the target. If this kills the target, infuse a (fortitude).

extraction_notes: Card has (fortitude) and (warding) icons. Rendered as (fortitude) and (warding) per text rendering rules.
